137 P1AH P1AH_RADIATION 38ae(P1ah)Special Care - Radiation CHAR 1 Indicates the patient received radiation. Includes radiation therapy or having a radiation implant. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
138 P1AI P1AI_SUCTION 38af(P1ai)Special Care - Suctioning CHAR 1 Indicates the patient received suctioning. Includes nasopharyngeal or tracheal aspiration. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
139 P1AJ P1AJ_TRACH_CARE 38ag(P1aj)Special Care - Tracheostomy Care CHAR 1
